Promotional Period: [month] Months
No Interest if paid in full within [month] Months*

  • [Finance_amount] (amount financed after [Down_payment_amount] down payment) or $[EMI_amount] per month suggested payments with [month] months special financing which includes 2% promo fee of [Promo_Fee]
No Interest if paid in full within [month] Months*
  • On qualifying purchases made with your Medical Saunas Synchrony credit card. Interest will be charged to your account from the purchase date if the promotional balance is not paid in full within [month] months. Minimum monthly payments required.
  • *A promo fee, equal to 2% of the amount financed at time of purchase, will be shown as a separate transaction on your billing statement and included in the balance subject to this promo. Any taxes, delivery or other charges included in the amount financed will increase the related promo fee and the required monthly payments. For example, a $950 purchase with $50 in taxes and shipping costs, will be charged a promo fee equal to $20 and $1,020 will be charged to your account. No interest will be charged on the amount financed (including related promo fee), and equal monthly payments are required on such balance until it is paid in full. The payments equal the amount financed (including related promo fee) divided by the number of months in the promo period, rounded up to the next cent. These payments may be higher than the payments that would be required if this purchase was a non-promo purchase. During the last month(s) of the promo period the required monthly payment may be reduced due to the prior months’ rounding. Regular account terms apply to non-promo purchases. New Accounts as of 07/16/2024: Purchase APR 34.99%. Penalty APR 39.99%. Min Interest Charge $2.
  • Existing cardholders: See your credit card agreement terms. Subject to credit approval.
Call (818) 740-7012 to see if you qualify!

Dr. Oz and Oprah in a Sauna
The Health Benefits of Far Infrared Saunas for Cancer
The Health Benefits of Far Infrared Saunas for Cancer

settings.yt_video_head: Medical benefits of a Medical Sauna™
settings.yt_video_content_top: Sauna usage has become increasingly popular over the last several years, as evidenced by Google trends. Respected cardiologist Dr. Jari Laukkanen, alongside experts such as Dr. Rhonda Patrick, PhD, and renowned nutritionist Thomas DeLauer, have emphasized the many potential health advantages of sauna therapy. These benefits are bolstered by companies like Medical Sauna™, which worked with over 48 doctors to construct a medical-grade facility for customers. Regular sessions in these medical saunas can help reduce risks of cardiovascular diseases, stroke, dementia, and even Alzheimer's, as well as boost blood circulation, aid muscle recovery, and provide pain relief. Adding a commercial Medical Spa to your business not only supports your community in establishing a healthy daily sauna routine but also promotes a lifestyle that offers comprehensive care for one's mental, physical, and emotional well-being.

settings.name: Claire Z.,
settings.colcontent: I got this for my yoga studio for clients to use after sessions and I will buy another as its so popular.

settings.name: Dominic Y.,
settings.colcontent: Love this addition to our mountaintop motel, we have had a lot more business during the fall and winter seasons.

settings.name: Naomi X.,
settings.colcontent: Owning a wellness center, it was critical for us to invest in a sauna that wasn't just warm and inviting, but also medically beneficial. Its cardiovascular health benefits, has been a major selling point for our clientele as well as serving some our recovering or adapted athletes with muscle recovery. I love to see our clients get better everyday.

settings.name: Austin W.,
settings.colcontent: Entertainment is well-catered for with a four-speaker audio system and Bluetooth. Been thinking of getting the heat resistant tablet with this as well so I can have the full theater.

settings.name: Penelope V.,
settings.colcontent: We ordered the Medical Spa 487 model for our gym, and it's been a fantastic addition.

settings.name: Adrian U.,
settings.colcontent: As a physiotherapy clinic, we see lots of patients with sleep disorders. Our sauna has become an integral part of our treatment, helping many to sleep better.

settings.name: Violet T.,
settings.colcontent: Our spa has a wide range of clients, and everyone from fitness enthusiasts to those just seeking relaxation love the sauna.

settings.name: Tristan S.,
settings.colcontent: We cater to a lot of athletes at our physical therapy center. The sauna has been a hit with them, especially those dealing with muscular injuries as we also bought a frozen from them to offer hot/cold therapy. We have a lot more patients coming in asking about the benefits of saunas and hot therapy in general, it is definitely a growing interest.

settings.name: Hazel R.,
settings.colcontent: Running a busy health clinic is stressful. Investing in a sauna was a godsend. Our clients say it's helped them reduce anxiety, making our clinic even more valuable.

settings.name: Aaron Q.,
settings.colcontent: Our wellness center clients can't stop raving about the benefits of our new sauna.

settings.name: Hannah P.,
settings.colcontent: We installed this sauna in our large family-run spa and it's now the favorite spot for our clients! We only offered it for use on weekends at first but then decided to add it to our regular services available during the week. Now it is booked a week in advance and I am thinking og buying a second smaller one for the individual as well as groups.

settings.name: Adam O.,
settings.colcontent: We've received feedback about less muscle soreness and faster recovery. It's proven to be an excellent asset to our gym.

settings.name: Victoria N.,
settings.colcontent: As a business owner, providing a stress-free environment is crucial. This sauna does that great as theres not really maintenance needed for me or my employees since its so durable.

settings.name: Nathan M.,
settings.colcontent: Impressed by the sauna's energy efficiency. The heating system rocks and the electric bill doesn't complain.

settings.name: Scarlett L.,
settings.colcontent: The LED control panel makes it easy for our customers to control their experience as well as less expensive to train staff.

settings.name: Isaiah K.,
settings.colcontent: They are equipped with advanced features which our members love like the customization of the detox experience, and the energy efficient heating system is perfect for our green initiatives. It also comes with more additional included features then what others come with without more price so definitely the right choice for small time business owners.

settings.name: Madison J.,
settings.colcontent: It's not just well-built, but it's also got this audio theater and color therapy stuff that just takes it to a whole other level. Way beyond what I thought it would be.

settings.name: Carter I.,
settings.colcontent: It heats up incredibly fast with its rapid internal heating system, which means I get to spend more time enjoying the sauna.

settings.name: Harper H.,
settings.colcontent: The interior reading light is really appreciated by most our clients as its nice to read and relax while waiting for their session to end. They tell me a lot of other places dont have this feature in their facilities so it gets pretty boring but not with ours!

settings.name: Jackson G.,
settings.colcontent: My clients love to hang out wih friends in there a way to recoup the week which is great to see. I am thinking of buying another after my expansion.

settings.heading: CUSTOMER
settings.textcontent: To help you decide for yourself how effective Medical Saunas are, we have listed REAL, UNCENSORED, UNEDITED reviews, emails and comments from customers who have paid for and used Medical Saunas™.
